post.subject: WHY!
post.body:
So Christmas was good. Got drunk at uncles on Christmas Eve, stayed at home on Christmas Day, had quite a nice dinner. Went to Cousins on Sunday and got more presents - mostly HMV/Virgin vouchers - and got v. drunk with Helen. HEEEHEEEE Was lots of fun!! Then got home and went to bed. 

Monday morning i got up at 8am and went to work. I still felt drunk...

Recovered throughout the day.

Im working everyday this week. I have no time to spend any of my vouchers. I have no money. I have no friends... - yeah fuck it - im not goin any further. I was happy until about an hour ago...
